title: Service vehicle after assembly
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service vehicle after assembly demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify vehicle service requirements from work orders1.2 Select tools, equipment and materials relevant to vehicle service requirements1.3 Check all selected tools, equipment and materials to ensure they are in good working order to meet job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify vehicle service requirements from work orders1.2 Select tools, equipment and materials relevant to vehicle service requirements1.3 Check all selected tools, equipment and materials to ensure they are in good working order to meet job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify vehicle service requirements from work orders1.2 Select tools, equipment and materials relevant to vehicle service requirements1.3 Check all selected tools, equipment and materials to ensure they are in good working order to meet job requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Select and use lubricants and fluids

pcs.text: Select and match lubricants and fluids to vehicle specifications, according to lubrication and fluid data sheets2.2 Use lubricants and fluids on the identified parts2.3 Fill reservoirs and mechanical assemblies to specified levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and match lubricants and fluids to vehicle specifications, according to lubrication and fluid data sheets2.2 Use lubricants and fluids on the identified parts2.3 Fill reservoirs and mechanical assemblies to specified levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and match lubricants and fluids to vehicle specifications, according to lubrication and fluid data sheets2.2 Use lubricants and fluids on the identified parts2.3 Fill reservoirs and mechanical assemblies to specified levels.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select and use lubricants and fluids

elements.title: Bleed air and hydraulic systems

pcs.text: Identify bleeding points for air and hydraulic systems from specification sheets3.2 Bleed air and hydraulic systems according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify bleeding points for air and hydraulic systems from specification sheets3.2 Bleed air and hydraulic systems according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify bleeding points for air and hydraulic systems from specification sheets3.2 Bleed air and hydraulic systems according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Bleed air and hydraulic systems

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Identify and report faults to appropriate personnel4.2 Clean and maintain tools, equipment and work area, identifying, tagging and reporting faulty equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Dispose of waste and used materials, ensuring they are disposed of, reused or recycled according to workplace procedures and product specifications4.4 Complete service checklists and workplace material lists according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report faults to appropriate personnel4.2 Clean and maintain tools, equipment and work area, identifying, tagging and reporting faulty equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Dispose of waste and used materials, ensuring they are disposed of, reused or recycled according to workplace procedures and product specifications4.4 Complete service checklists and workplace material lists according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report faults to appropriate personnel4.2 Clean and maintain tools, equipment and work area, identifying, tagging and reporting faulty equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Dispose of waste and used materials, ensuring they are disposed of, reused or recycled according to workplace procedures and product specifications4.4 Complete service checklists and workplace material lists according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
